title: ophrys candica subsp. calliantha
intro: Ophrys candica subsp. calliantha, also known as the bee orchid, is a type of orchid plant that belongs to the Ophrys genus. It is a flowering plant native to the Iberian Peninsula and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is rich in flavonoids, terpenes, and other compounds that provide health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Traditionally, the bee orchid has been prepared as a tincture or decoction and used in herbal medicine to treat a range of health issues, including colds and flu.
